ddt:Target.Name: N_HJB_EVAP_UDS_SOP_20200724
ddt:Target.Description:
[3] Feb 11th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified FFD, DM and ID items, based on Rev3.
[2] Nov 28th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Modified CANID.
[1] Jul 3rd, 2018 Nissan XX6 Added, Modified item ID,FFD,DM,AT,WS,DF.
[N] Feb 12th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
[P043E]EVAP System Leak Detection Reference Orifice Low Flow
[P043F]EVAP System Leak Detection Reference Orifice High Flow
[P04B3]Refueling Vapor Control Valve Stuck Performance/Stuck Open
[P04BD]Fuel Fill Door Unlock Control Circuit Low
[P04BE]Fuel Fill Door Unlock Control Circuit High
[P04EC]EVAP System Large Leak Detected - Fuel Tank Side
[P04ED]EVAP System Large Leak Detected - Fresh Air Side
[P04EE]EVAP System Very Small Leak Detected - Fuel Tank Side
[P04EF]EVAP System Very Small Leak Detected - Fresh Air Side
[P0603]Internal Control Module Keep Alive Memory (KAM) Error
[P0604]Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
[P0605]Internal Control Module Read Only Memory (ROM) Error
[P0668]Control Module Internal Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit Low
[P0669]Control Module Internal Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit High
[P1603]Internal Control Module EEPROM Error (Reading EEPROM not OBD Related)
[P2400]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Control Circuit/Open
[P2401]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Control Circuit Low
[P2402]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Control Circuit High
[P2419]EVAP System Switching Valve Control Circuit Low
[P2420]EVAP System Switching Valve Control Circuit High
[P24B9]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit Range/Performance
[P24BA]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit Low
[P24BB]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit High
[P24BC]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit Intermittent
[P24BE]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Control Circuit Low
[P24BF]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Control Circuit High
[P24C0]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Stuck On
[P24C1]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Performance/Stuck Off
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: DataRead_$1011_#004_bit0_Internal Atmospheric temp Sensor for Cross Check

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: DataRead.DataRead_$1011_#004_bit0_Internal Atmospheric temp Sensor for Cross Check

DataItem.Name: DataRead_$1011_#004_bit0_Internal Atmospheric temp Sensor for Cross Check

Device.Name: [P043E]EVAP System Leak Detection Reference Orifice Low Flow
[P043F]EVAP System Leak Detection Reference Orifice High Flow
[P04B1]Refueling Vapor Control Valve Circuit Low
[P04B2]Refueling Vapor Control Valve Circuit High
[P04B3]Refueling Vapor Control Valve Stuck Performance/Stuck Open
[P04B4]Refueling Vapor Control Valve Stuck Closed
[P04B6]Fuel Fill Door Stuck Closed

[P04BE]Fuel Fill Door Unlock Control Circuit High

[P04ED]EVAP System Large Leak Detected - Fresh Air Side

[P04EF]EVAP System Very Small Leak Detected - Fresh Air Side

[P0604]Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
[P0605]Internal Control Module Read Only Memory (ROM) Error

[P0607]Control Module Performance
[P060A]Internal Control Module Monitoring Processor Performance
[P060B]Internal Control Module A/D Processing Performance
[P062F]Internal Control Module EEPROM Error
[P0667]Control Module Internal Temperature Sensor "A" Range/Performance
[P0668]Control Module Internal Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit Low
[P0669]Control Module Internal Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit High
[P1603]Internal Control Module EEPROM Error (Reading EEPROM not OBD Related)
[P2400]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Control Circuit/Open
[P2401]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Control Circuit Low
[P2402]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Control Circuit High
[P2419]EVAP System Switching Valve Control Circuit Low
[P2420]EVAP System Switching Valve Control Circuit High
[P2450]EVAP System Switching Valve Performance/Stuck Open
[P24B9]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit Range/Performance
[P24BA]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit Low
[P24BB]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit High
[P24BC]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor Circuit Intermittent
[P24BE]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Control Circuit Low
[P24BF]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Control Circuit High
[P24C0]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Stuck On
[P24C1]EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Switching Valve Performance/Stuck Off
[P24D6]EVAP System Pressure Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit Range/Performance
[P24D7]EVAP System Pressure Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit Low
[P24D8]EVAP System Pressure Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit High
[P24D9]EVAP System Pressure Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit Intermittent
[P2610]ECM/PCM Engine Off Timer Performance
[P2B7B]EVAP System Pressure Sensor/Switch "C" Circuit Range/Performance
[P2B7C]EVAP System Pressure Sensor/Switch "C" Circuit Low
[P2B7D]EVAP System Pressure Sensor/Switch "C" Circuit High
[U2140]CAN comm err (ECM)
[U2143]CAN comm err (VCM/HCM)
[U2148]CAN comm err (brake control unit)
[U214E]CAN comm err (combination meter)
[U214F]CAN comm err (BCM)
[U215B]CAN comm err (IPDM E/R)
